### Volcanos!

LOTTAVOLCANOES! A world with a simply ridiculous number of volcanos. This was developed in this Reddit thread and tested in 43.05

    Created in DF v0.43.05.

### Islands

ISOLATED ISLANDS! A world filled somewhat with islands. Good to try a hermit challenge. This was developed by Grax and updated by Vattic in the following thread. Tested in DF v0.47.04 and still works. The thread also details how to customize your island.

    Created in DF v0.34.11.
